title: Sculk Weaponry
description: A sculk resource pack that started from the idea of Sculk and a Mace
body:
A resource pack that will change the textures of your weapons and utilities to add sculk to your favorite pvp items.

I am on the Mace PvP community discord server, so if there are bugs or changes that need to be made, let me know. I go by Credible728
